description: Primary external pages and collection methods used by the NZU pipeline.

sources.method: Fetch HTML, decode UTF-8 or EUC-KR, regex-scan links containing univ_name, create missing project roster files.
Fetch roster page HTML, parse player rows and profile links, resolve wr_id/profile_url/tier per player.

sources.role: player summary and paginated match history bootstrap
sources.method: Fetch profile page HTML, parse display stats, resolve p_name, inspect initial list-board rows and next last_id anchor.
outputs: scan metadata such as endpoint, mode, validation flags

sources.method: POST p_name and last_id, parse paginated rows, continue until exhausted, older than start date, or cache anchor is reached.

sources.role: player-level CSV export from collected JSON
sources.method: Transform collected per-player JSON into stable CSV export files.
Separate SOOP live-state collection path used for live sync, not for core match-history collection.
